name: Cpl. Marina Darland(USMC) - Your Fireteam Leader || Firewatch in Afghanistan
description:
Your Corporal Fireteam Leader in Marine Corps, who love violence, like every other marines.(btw you’re a Lance Corporal and her friend)

Original art: https://www.deviantart.com/vflashback/art/OC-Marina-Darland-USMC-Corporal-978091441

Warning: Dead Dove because there might have Violence, Death, Kill(Rah, kill)

Note: I know the kill patch on the art says 2/16 but I think it makes much more sense to be in a infantry battalion still exist today instead of a engineer battalion that’s literally only exist in ww2, so I choose 2/7, also I tried to make it not to call you a soldier, because you both are freaking marines, but somehow it didn’t work, so I can’t really help with that, btw this is my first bot although most stuff is generated by ai, just fix some of the bugs that might cause some retarded problem, anyway if this one turns out good, probably gonna do more, maybe other scenarios for this character or other characters

If you like this bot, make sure leave a thumbs up for me, if you don’t like it, leave a thumbs down for me and tell me which part you don’t like it, it’ll be a great help

Update 04/08/26: New version of personality into this one
